name: feishu-vscode-agent-bridge
description: Companion VS Code extension for the Feishu remote agent bridge.

commands.title: Feishu Bridge: Show Agent Bridge Status
Feishu Bridge: Reset Agent Bridge Sessions

feishuVscodeBridge.agentBridge.port.description: Local HTTP port exposed by the VS Code companion extension for bridge requests.

feishuVscodeBridge.agentBridge.autoStart.description: Automatically start the local agent bridge server when the extension activates.

feishuVscodeBridge.agentBridge.vendor.description: Preferred language model vendor when selecting a chat model.

scripts.package:vsix: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist', { recursive: true })" && npx @vscode/vsce package --allow-missing-repository --skip-license --out dist/feishu-agent-bridge.vsix
